trip.title: NYC Food Trip
trip.travelers: You + group (group present Thu, Fri after 7PM, Sat until departure)

hotels.name: Holiday Inn Express LIC
hotels.area: Long Island City, near Court Sq

hotels.name: TRYP by Wyndham Times Square South

payment_notes: OMNY only - tap the SAME contactless card or phone for every ride
Same card all trip = free transfers + $35 weekly cap
CASH needed: Wah Fung ($20), Katz's cutter tip ($5 singles)

schedule.theme: Arrival, LIC, Times Square late night

items.activity: Check in / drop bags at Holiday Inn LIC

schedule.theme: Summit day + Rockefeller walking tour after 7 PM

summit.label: Empowered Run Club + Coffee House devotionals

schedule.theme: Closing 11 AM, Group: Gapstow, You: food crawl

items.activity: Group grabs bags at Holiday Inn LIC

kyuramen.name: Kyuramen LIC
kyuramen.order: Beef shoyu ramen, spicy pork ramen, yakitori
kyuramen.notes: Near hotel. Mon-Thu 11 AM-5 PM items HALF PRICE.

joes_pizza.name: Joe's Pizza Broadway
joes_pizza.order: Plain cheese or pepperoni slice, fold and walk
joes_pizza.notes: Classic NYC slice in Times Square. $4-5. Cash or card.

hmart.name: H Mart Koreatown
hmart.order: Korean BBQ, bibimbap, tteokbokki, kimchi pancake
hmart.notes: Food court upstairs. Pay each vendor separately. 5 min from TRYP.

wah_fung.name: Wah Fung No.1 Fast Food
wah_fung.notes: CASH ONLY. CLOSES 7 PM - arrive by 6. Near Grand St (B/D).

katz.name: Katz's Delicatessen
katz.address: 205 E Houston St, New York, NY 10002
katz.notes: Tip the cutter cash for a taste. DON'T lose your ticket ($50).

levain.name: Levain Bakery
levain.notes: Hockey-puck cookies. 1 train to 72 St. Grab extras for the flight.

ichiran.name: Ichiran Times Square
ichiran.order: Tonkotsu ramen, customize on the order sheet

glace.name: Glace Rockefeller Center
glace.notes: Viral spot. ~$10. Skip if line is 40+ min.

times_square.name: Times Square
times_square.notes: #1 first-timer sight, best after dark. Walk the pedestrian plazas 42nd-47th.

rockefeller.name: Rockefeller Center
rockefeller.notes: Plaza with Atlas & Prometheus statues. N/W to 49 St, 3 min walk.

st_patricks.name: St. Patrick's Cathedral
st_patricks.notes: Across 5th Ave from Rockefeller. Free, stunning interior.

fifth_ave.name: 5th Avenue
fifth_ave.address: 5th Ave & E 50th St, New York, NY 10022
fifth_ave.notes: Flagship stores, lights. Walk south toward Times Square.

gapstow.name: Gapstow Bridge
gapstow.address: Gapstow Bridge, Central Park, New York, NY 10019
gapstow.notes: Postcard Central Park view - stone bridge over the Pond, Midtown skyline behind. N/W to 5 Av/59 St, 5 min walk. Best photo from south side looking north.

jfk_to_lic.title: JFK to Holiday Inn LIC
steps: After bags, follow AirTrain signs (upper level, any terminal)
AirTrain toward JAMAICA STATION, tap card on exit ($8.75)
Follow signs to E train (Sutphin Blvd-Archer Av)
E train toward Manhattan, tap card ($3)
Ride to COURT SQ-23 ST (~25 min), walk to hotel
jfk_to_lic.note: The E is the only subway that reaches JFK's AirTrain at Jamaica.

melrose_to_timessq.title: Melrose Ballroom to Times Square
steps: Walk to 39 Av-Dutch Kills station (N/W), ~5 min
N or W train toward Manhattan / Coney Island
Ride to TIMES SQ-42 ST (~6 stops)
Joe's Pizza is 1 block away at 1435 Broadway
melrose_to_timessq.note: Return: N/W from Times Sq back to 39 Av-Dutch Kills (toward Astoria).

melrose_to_rockefeller.title: Melrose Ballroom to Rockefeller Center
steps: Walk to 39 Av-Dutch Kills station (N/W), ~5 min
N or W train toward Manhattan
Ride to 49 ST (~5 stops)
Walk 3 min east to Rockefeller Center / 5th Ave
melrose_to_rockefeller.note: Return: walk to Times Square after the 5th Ave stroll, N/W back to LIC.

melrose_to_gapstow.title: Melrose Ballroom to Gapstow Bridge
steps: Walk to 39 Av-Dutch Kills station (N/W), ~5 min
N or W train toward Manhattan
Ride to 5 AV/59 ST (~4 stops)
Walk 5 min into Central Park's SE corner to Gapstow Bridge
melrose_to_gapstow.note: 5 Av/59 St is closest to Gapstow, by the Plaza Hotel. Return: N/W back to 39 Av-Dutch Kills for bags.

lic_to_jfk_group.title: GROUP: LIC to JFK
steps: From hotel, walk to Court Sq-23 St station
E train toward Jamaica (toward Queens, NOT Manhattan)
Ride to SUTPHIN BLVD-ARCHER AV-JFK (~20 min)
Follow AirTrain signs, AirTrain to Terminal 4, tap ($8.75)
lic_to_jfk_group.note: Leaving LIC by 1:15 PM puts them at JFK ~2:30 PM. Lots of buffer for a 7 PM flight.

lic_to_tryp.title: YOU: LIC to TRYP Times Square
steps: From hotel, walk to Court Sq-23 St (E) or Queensboro Plaza (7)
E to Times Sq area, or 7 train to Times Sq-42 St
Walk to TRYP by Wyndham (W 36th St area)

food_crawl.title: Food crawl: TRYP to H Mart to Wah Fung to Katz's
steps: TRYP to H Mart: walk 5 min to 38 W 32nd St
H Mart to Wah Fung: B/D from 34 St-Herald Sq to GRAND ST (~6 stops)
Walk 5 min to 79 Chrystie St (closes 7 PM, arrive by 6)
Wah Fung to Katz's: walk 4 blocks to 205 E Houston St
Katz's to TRYP: Uber (~$25) or F train 2 Av to 34 St-Herald Sq

levain_run.title: Sunday: Levain run (UWS)
steps: TRYP to Levain: 1 train from Times Sq-42 St to 72 ST
Walk to 167 W 74th St
Return: 1 train 72 St to Times Sq-42 St, walk to Ichiran (W 49th)

tryp_to_jfk.title: TRYP to JFK
steps: Walk to Penn Station (~5 min from TRYP)
Buy LIRR ticket to JAMAICA at machine ($5.25 off-peak)
Board train labeled 'Jamaica', ~18 min
At Jamaica, follow AirTrain signs, AirTrain to Terminal 4, tap ($8.75)
tryp_to_jfk.note: Backup: A/C/E or taxi. Uber from TRYP to JFK is $70-90 + tolls, 45-75 min.

group_highlights.note: The #1 first-timer sight, best after dark. Already there for Joe's Pizza.
Plaza, Atlas & Prometheus, St. Patrick's Cathedral across the street, 5th Ave flagship stores. All free, one walk.
Postcard Central Park view. Quick 30 min via N/W to 5 Av/59 St, then group heads to JFK from the Queens side.
